mapper.sql:
and posting = true
and ( to_date(begin_day, 'YYYYMMDD') between to_date(#{param.beginDay}, 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date(#{param.endDay}, 'YYYYMMDD') or to_date(end_day, 'YYYYMMDD') between to_date(#{param.beginDay}, 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date(#{param.endDay}, 'YYYYMMDD') or (to_date(begin_day, 'YYYYMMDD') < to_date(#{param.beginDay}, 'YYYYMMDD') and to_date(end_day, 'YYYYMMDD') > to_date(#{param.endDay}, 'YYYYMMDD')) )
and event_nm like '%'||#{param.searchCn}||'%'
and event_id in ( select event_id from cmmt_event_cn where article_cn like '%'||#{param.searchCn}||'%' )
and ( event_nm like '%'||#{param.searchCn}||'%' or event_id in ( select event_id from cmmt_event_cn where article_cn like '%'||#{param.searchCn}||'%' ) )
mapper.select: /** CmmtEventDao.selectList_count */ select count(*) as cnt from cmmt_event where
/** CmmtEventDao.selectList_posting_count */ select count(*) as cnt from cmmt_event where 1=1

/** CmmtEventDao.selectList_posting */ select event_id ,event_nm ,begin_day ,end_day ,pc_thumbnail_file_id ,mobile_thumbnail_file_id ,thumbnail_alt_cn ,url ,new_window ,attachment_group_id ,read_cnt ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt ,#{totalItems} + 1 - (row_number() over(order by ${param.sortType} desc)) as rn from cmmt_event where 1=1
order by ${param.sortType} desc offset #{beginRowNum} - 1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** CmmtEventDao.selectPrevNext */ select y.event_id ,y.event_nm ,y.prev_event_id ,y.prev_event_nm ,y.next_event_id ,y.next_event_nm from ( select x.* ,lead(x.event_id) over w as prev_event_id ,lead(x.event_nm) over w as prev_event_nm ,lag(x.event_id) over w as next_event_id ,lag(x.event_nm) over w as next_event_nm from ( select event_id ,event_nm ,${param.sortType} ,'EVENT' as grouping_key from cmmt_event where 1=1
) x window w as (partition by x.grouping_key order by ${param.sortType} desc) ) y where y.event_id = #{eventId}
